# claudeplatform_workspace (Data Source)

Look up a workspace by id or by name (exactly one).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by exact name...
data "claudeplatform_workspace" "ml_team" {
  name = "ml-team"
}

# ...or by ID.
data "claudeplatform_workspace" "by_id" {
  id = "wrkspc_01WgQMyXabc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Workspace ID (wrkspc_...).
- `name` (String) Workspace name (exact match).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_color` (String)
